1 PASPABOTAH CraxHgapt paspa6oTaH pa6ouen rpynnoi HLIKP (UBaHos Cepren

Bnaguuuposny, K.T.H., CTaPLUUM Hay4Hbi CoTpyAHNk HL|KP)

2 BHECEH TexuHuyeckum KomMUTeTOM No cTaHgapTu3sayuu «VckycCTBeHHbI VHTeN-

NIEKT».

3 YTBEP)KQEH UV BBEJEH B JEUCTBUE Npuka3zom PegepanbHoro areHTcTBa NO

TEXHUYECKOMY PeryMUpPOBaHUto U MeTpONOrun OT No
4 BBEQEH BNEPBbIE

Tlpasuna npumexeHus Hacmoawe2o CMaHOapma ycmaHoesenbi 6 cmambe 26 De-
OepanbHoeo 3aKkoHa om 29 utoHA 2015 2. Ne 162-03 «O cmaxdapmus3auuu 6 Poccuticxoti
PMedepauuu». Vieqbopmauua 06 u3meHeHUAX K Hacmoswemy CMaHOapmy ny6nuKyemca 6
eKe20dHom (m0 cocmosHuto Ha 1 AHeapA MeKyLWe20 200a) UHGOPMAUUOHHOM yKazamene
«Hauuonanbuble cMaHOapmMbi», a OqduuUaNbHbIti MeKCM U3MeHeHUL U NONMpaeoK — Be
e@xKeMeCAYHOM yKasamene «HauuoHanbHble cmaHkOapmbi». B cnyyae nepecmompa (3a-
mMeHb!) UU OMMeHbI HAaCMOAWe20 CMaHOapma coomeemcmeyiowee yeedommenue by-
dem ony6nukoeaHo 6 6nurxatiwiem ebiNnyCKe @KEMECAYHOZO UHGOPMaUUOHHOeO yka3za-
mena «HauuonanbHble cmaHdapmbi». Coomeemcmeynouwar uxqopmauus, yeedomnexue
u mekcMb! pa3mewaiomca MaKwKe @ UHGOPpMauUOHHON Cucmeme OOweeO NOMb30eaHUA
— Ha oquuvanbxom catime MedepanbHoeo azeHmcmea mo MmexHUYecKOMy peeymuposa-
Huo U MemporioeuU eB cemu VmepHem (www.gost.ru).

© Crangaptuncopm, 207?

pa@kupoBaH UM pacnpoctpaHeH B KayecTBe OdbuliManbHoro u3qaHua Ge3 paspeweHua Dege-
PanbHoro areHTcTBa No TexHUYeCKOMy perymupoBaHuid u MeTponorun

BBegenue

CucTemMb! NOAAeP KK NPUHATUA PELUCHUM ABNALOTCA BarKHEMLWMM VHCTPYMEHTOM
NPuUMeHeHNA VUHCPOPMaLMOHHbIX TEXHONMOrMN ANA PeWeHUvA NpakTUYeCKUX 3ag4ay¥ B pa3-

HUN OCHOBbI ANA B3avMogelcTBUA MexKAy paspaSoTUukamu, 3aKkas4uVKaMu, NOMb30BaTe-
NAMM MY akKCcNepTamu No KBaNudukayMu NPoOAYKTOB VHCPOPpMaLMOHHbIX TeXHONOrM, ABNA-
FOLUUXCA B CBOE OCHOBe CVCTeMaMN NOAAePxKKNY NPUHATUA PelWeHUM, UMerOLMMN Npu-
3HAKU TaKUX CUCTEM UNM BKNOYaIOLUMX TaKUe CUCTEMb!I B KOMNNeKC NporpamMmM. Npousso-

Qata BBegenua —

1 O6nacTb npumMeHeHnaA
